rationale: The citing paper says it builds on agency/signaling logic for preannouncement credibility and vaporware risk, and the cited paper is a signaling framework about reputation building and bluffing ("hiding the truth") in competitive interaction. That construct-level overlap (signals, credibility/reputation, deceptive claims) makes this plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental background mention, so it should be kept for full judgment.
